lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Good day to you bwana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you ferry me to that island?

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Most certainly, but my services come at a price... of 10,000 coins

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have that sort of money!

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Then you do not belong on my island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine!

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Bye bye bwana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, here's the ridiculous sum of money...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why so much? You'd get more business if you charged less.

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: The price is to keep the island quiet, bwana. It's a great place to train, but competing with others can be a hassle and so, for a price, you train in peace!

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Most certainly, but my services come at a price... of 5,000 coins

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, here's the ridiculous sum of money...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why so much? You'd get more business if you charged less.

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: The price is to keep the island quiet, bwana. It's a great place to train, but competing with others can be a hassle and so, for a price, you train in peace!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's too much for me.

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Then you do not belong on my island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine!

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Bye bye bwana.

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Of course! I won't even charge you for the privilege.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Why bwana, I'm Sandicrahb! I travel far over the ocean from the tropical land of Karamja.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How come you're charging so much?

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: The gold is for a good cause, I promise bwana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh huh, that's a mighty fine gold necklace you have.

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Well bwana, of course I take a cut, but the funds keep these beaches clean and tidy, I promise!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you say so...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day to you too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a nice boat! Would be a shame if something were to happen to it.

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Made from the wood of the Fyburglars tree, strong and light weight! Perhaps if it went missing, I'd find you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps.

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Shall I return you to the beach?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please, I'm done here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've not quite finished yet, I'll stay.

lines.speaker: Sandicrahb
lines.text: Very well bwana.
